title: geum rivale var. pallidum
intro: Geum rivale var. pallidum, also known as the pale avens, is a perennial plant in the rose family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Geum rivale var. pallidum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to ease respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
